title: Leg.GG Recommended
description: A set of recommended mods to help play Extraction and other games on your favorite Minecraft Servers!
body:
![Leg.GG - Header](https://dunb17ur4ymx4.cloudfront.net/wysiwyg/1403738/edd06e0d16e3fcdfe1acde4958185270acb5f880.png)

Ever want to jump into a new Minecraft world with dozens of other players, voice chat, a simple minimap, and visuals to die for? Now's your chance!

This pack comes pre-loaded with all mods to make your time on your favorite Minecraft server as easy as possible, and maps and other data loaded in place to make your time in some of it's more complicated games even easier!

![Running on Random Banner](https://dunb17ur4ymx4.cloudfront.net/wysiwyg/1403738/83300dbef942a15eafdecdb191d1c2c1e084fb10.png)
Get ready to move in this 8 player race gamemode on a different track every time! Fight against other players in showdown races, jump into Time Trial, or help create the game in the track builder!

![Blowout Banner](https://dunb17ur4ymx4.cloudfront.net/wysiwyg/1403738/358a55be12be6a7241969f3220c60122b208c5db.png)
Want silly PVP? WE GOT YOUR SILLY PVP! This is BLOWOUT, a game where when your hearts hit zero, you EXPLODE! Keep out of the void for as long as possible as the explosion level continues rising, with custom weapons and armor in this explosive minigame!

![Flower Frenzy Banner](https://dunb17ur4ymx4.cloudfront.net/wysiwyg/1403738/7a942ed1065a769fc5313b068acc10b6e115841a.png)
Ready for whimsey? Collect the most flowers in 15 minutes while fighting other players to be on top! Keep an eye out for the elusive MEGA FLOWER which spawns at halftime, and be ready to fight for your beautiful collection!

![Extraction Banner](https://dunb17ur4ymx4.cloudfront.net/wysiwyg/1403738/4bddf52070890692b4ad1ee893f48877ee79ee2d.png)
EXTRACTION is a custom-coded looter shooter extraction game! Live, die, repeat in a custom created world filled with custom loot, unique crafting, and a seasonal leaderboard of who can collect the most Echo Shards!
